Section Title: ... > This move by DSP Mutual Fund is a precautionary measure to ensure it does not exceed the re...
Content:
ADVERTISEMENT
By [Anshul](https://www.cnbctv18.com/author/anshul-7621/ "Anshul") [](https://twitter.com/anshul91_m "https://twitter.com/anshul91_m") October 4, 2024, 12:49:14 PM IST (Published)
2 Min Read
[](https://www.google.com/preferences/source?q=cnbctv18.com "CNBCTV18 on Google") [](https://api.whatsapp.com/send?text=DSP%20Mutual%20Fund%20temporarily%20suspends%20fresh%20inflows%20in%20international%20funds%20https%3A%2F%2Fwww.cnbctv18.com%2Fpersonal-finance%2Fdsp-mutual-fund-temporarily-suspends-fresh-inflows-international-funds-investments-19487161.htm "DSP Mutual Fund temporarily suspends fresh inflows in international funds")
In an effort to avoid breaching regulatory caps on overseas investments, DSP Mutual Fund has announced a temporary suspension on certain international schemes.
Section Title: ... > This move by DSP Mutual Fund is a precautionary measure to ensure it does not exceed the re...
Content:
*The fund house has stopped accepting lumpsum investments, as well as new registrations for Systematic Investment Plans (SIPs) and Systematic Transfer Plans (STPs), in the following funds:*
DSP Global Innovation Fund of Fund
DSP Global Allocation Fund of Fund
DSP Global Clean Energy Fund of Fund
DSP World Agriculture Fund
DSP US Flexible Equity Fund of Fund
DSP World Gold Fund of Fund
DSP World Mining Fund
However, existing SIPs and STPs in these funds will continue as usual.
 ... 
Section Title: DSP Mutual Fund temporarily suspends fresh inflows in international funds > You May Like
Content:
This move by DSP Mutual Fund is a precautionary measure to ensure it does not exceed the regulatory limits set for mutual fund investments in overseas markets.
The limits, defined by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI), restrict the overall industry’s exposure to overseas securities at $7 billion and to overseas Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs) at $1 billion.
In January 2022, SEBI, in coordination with the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI), directed asset management companies (AMCs) to temporarily restrict subscriptions in funds investing in overseas securities once their industry-wide limit was close to being breached.

Continue Reading

excerpts:
[Business News](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com "The Economic Times") › [Mutual Funds](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/mutual-funds "Mutual Funds") › [Mutual Funds News](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/mf/mf-news "Mutual Funds News") › DSP Mutual Fund temporarily restricts subscription in its multi asset allocation fund
 ... 
Section Title: DSP Mutual Fund temporarily restricts subscription in its multi asset allocation fund
Content:
SECTIONS
DSP Mutual Fund temporarily restricts subscription in its multi asset allocation fund
By
Surbhi Khanna
, ET Online Last Updated: Feb 26, 2026, 03:02:00 PM IST
Rate Story
[](https://www.google.com/preferences/source?q=economictimes)
[Follow us](https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb6dOI1EKyZPPqpH7I0y)
Share
Font Size
Abc Small
Abc Medium
Abc Large
Save
Print
Comment
Synopsis
DSP Mutual Fund is placing temporary restrictions on new investments in its Multi Asset Allocation Fund starting February 27. This move is due to significant inflows making it difficult to manage the fund's asset allocation. Investors can still make transactions up to Rs 10 lakh per day. Existing SIPs and switch-ins will continue.

excerpts:
Section Title: India: SEBI & RBI Restrictions on Global Mutual Funds – What FMEs Need to Know
Content:
Author: Veronica Pasumarthy
|
Date: 23 June 2025
|
Categories: Shareholder Disclosures
To manage forex volatility, SEBI and RBI have imposed strict caps on overseas mutual fund investments:
**Industry-wide cap:** USD 7 billion
**AMC-specific cap:** USD 1 billion
**ETF-specific cap:** USD 1 billion
